meta.title: GEONYX CHEM | Chemical Resistant Mineral Floor System
meta.description: GEONYX CHEM – mineral chemically resistant flooring for zones exposed to oils, acids, solvents, electrolytes and industrial chemicals.

hero.description: Mineral chemical-resistant system for zones exposed to acids, bases, oils, solvents, and disinfectants. Engineered to protect concrete and structures where standard resin coatings have already failed.

diagnostics.title: WHEN FLUIDS DESTROY CONCRETE
diagnostics.subtitle: Acids, bases, oils, salts, and solvents slowly consume the structure. GEONYX CHEM stops this process and turns the floor into a working barrier.
diagnostics.d1problem: Spills and vapours from inorganic acids (H₂SO₄, HCl, HNO₃) attack concrete, corrode joints, and expose reinforcement.
diagnostics.d1solution: Mineral matrix with high resistance to inorganic acids – minimal mass loss under long-term immersion and cyclic spills.
diagnostics.d2problem: Alkaline cleaning agents and process solutions degrade the surface and open the pores of the concrete.
diagnostics.d2solution: GEONYX CHEM is balanced for the full pH spectrum 2–14 and withstands cyclic alkali exposure without softening or swelling.
diagnostics.d3problem: Hydraulic oils, diesel, and lubricants penetrate pores, delaminate coatings, and leave the floor permanently contaminated and slippery.
diagnostics.d3solution: Oleophobic mineral structure that neither dissolves nor softens – contaminants remain on the surface and are easier to wash off.
diagnostics.d4problem: Organic solvents and specialty fluids rapidly destroy classic resin coatings and expose the bare concrete.
diagnostics.d4solution: Mineral base with no organic resins – no swelling, dissolution, or strength loss on contact with typical industrial solvents.
diagnostics.d5problem: Concentrated disinfectants, foam, and hot CIP solutions break down porous and resin-based systems in food, beverage, and pharma environments.
diagnostics.d5solution: GEONYX CHEM is compatible with sector-standard disinfectants and CIP chemistry, maintaining a smooth, seamless surface for easy cleaning.
diagnostics.d6problem: Nitrates, phosphates, chlorides, and agrochemicals attack concrete in silos, warehouses, and farms, causing rapid corrosion and dusting.
diagnostics.d6solution: Mineral chemical-resistant system for agricultural environments – barrier against salts and agrochemicals, compatible with alkali and water cleaning.
diagnostics.d7problem: Moisture and chemicals penetrating beneath coatings form blisters, delamination, and unpredictable defects.
diagnostics.d7solution: GEONYX CHEM bonds mineralogically to the substrate and eliminates underfilm voids – no blisters, no osmotic pressure, no hidden pockets.
diagnostics.d8problem: Spill zones, sumps, and channels must contain incidents without compromising the structure and the environment.
diagnostics.d8solution: GEONYX CHEM configurations for bunds, channels, and spill pads – dense mineral encapsulation, compatible with HYDRO and ARMOR for full protection.

anatomy.sectionSubtitle: Interactive layer model – from substrate to working surface.
anatomy.h1desc: Ground or milled concrete with open pores, corrected defects, and engineered joint management.
anatomy.h2desc: Mineral primer and, where required, an intermediate HYDRO layer to limit rising damp and osmosis.
anatomy.h3desc: Primary mineral matrix with high resistance to acids, bases, oils, and aggressive fluids.
anatomy.h4desc: Selected anti-slip class and finish compatible with cleaning regimes and sanitary standards.

engineeringProof.title: LABORATORY TESTS
engineeringProof.subtitle: Independent tests in accredited laboratories – full protocols available in TDS.
engineeringProof.block1note: GEONYX CHEM shows minimal mass change and no structural defects under the same conditions.
engineeringProof.block2note: Comparison of mass loss after cyclic exposure to sulphuric acid.
engineeringProof.block3note: Repair costs for standard solutions escalate, while GEONYX CHEM costs remain low.

operational.title: OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE
operational.r1desc: Ability to work in environments with elevated humidity and limited process shutdowns.
operational.r2desc: Configurations for a specific chemical list – with TDS for audit and internal approval.
operational.r3desc: Smooth yet non-slip surface, compatible with industrial washing, foam, and disinfectants.
operational.r4desc: Local REPAIR protocols without full system removal – minimal downtime.
operational.r5desc: Optimised for a long service life – fewer reinstallations, fewer unplanned costs.

financial.title: FINANCIAL LOGIC (TCO) IN CHEMICAL ENVIRONMENTS
financial.subtitle: Comparison of total cost of ownership.
financial.quote: CHEMISTRY MAY BE AGGRESSIVE, BUT THE FLOOR DOES NOT HAVE TO BE CONSUMABLE.
financial.quoteHighlight: THE RIGHT SYSTEM IS PAID FOR ONCE.

roiTable.title: INVESTMENT AUDIT
roiTable.subtitle: Life-cycle comparison between GEONYX CHEM and alternatives.
roiTable.val1chem: High – pH 2–14, resistance to oils and solvents
roiTable.val3epoxy: High risk with moisture and negative pressure
roiTable.val4chem: Local zones, fast return to service

applications.title: WHERE IT IS USED
applications.subtitle: Areas with high chemical aggression, solvents, and environmental contamination risk.
applications.a1desc: Production of acids, fertilisers, and polymers.
applications.a2desc: Dairies, breweries, and meat processing (CIP resistance).
applications.a3desc: Clean rooms and drug synthesis zones.

process.title: EXECUTION PROCESS
process.subtitle: Engineering control from analysis to protection.
process.p1desc: Collection of chemical lists, concentrations, temperatures, and cleaning regimes per zone.
process.p2desc: Analysis of concrete, moisture, joints, and loads – mechanical and thermal.
process.p3desc: Selection of the exact CHEM / ARMOR / HYDRO combination based on risk and service conditions.
process.p4desc: Mechanical preparation, joint treatment, channels, kerbs, and structural details.
process.p5desc: Phased execution aligned with the production schedule – minimal downtime for the client.
process.p6desc: Inspection, protocols, TDS/SDS package, and cleaning instructions for internal and external audits.

offerPackage.title: OFFER PACKAGE FOR CHEMICAL PROTECTION
offerPackage.desc: Complete engineering documentation for chemical plants, production facilities, and warehouses.
offerPackage.qualityDesc: All documents are compliant with EN/ISO standards for chemical resistance.
offerPackage.doc1: Full chemical audit by zone and process
offerPackage.doc2: Technical proposal for GEONYX CHEM configurations
offerPackage.doc3: TDS, SDS, and compliance with relevant EN/ISO standards
offerPackage.doc4: Details for joints, channels, kerbs, and structural connections
offerPackage.doc6: Warranty conditions and maintenance and cleaning protocol

cta.title: READY TO STOP CHEMICAL CORROSION?
cta.desc: Send a chemical list and a brief site description – we will prepare a specific CHEM configuration, execution schedule, and TCO analysis.

footerBand.label: TECHNOLOGY PARTNER FOR CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE
footerBand.desc: Need a system that can withstand mines, steelworks, logistics hubs, or energy facilities. GEONYX ARMOR combines geopolymer technology, laboratory data, and field testing to deliver flooring that can be defended before any investor or auditor.
